description.content:
Cyclr's REST API allows you to manage your Accounts and Cycles, as well as install Templates and Connectors. The API is divided into two parts: Partner Level and Account Level. You can use the same OAuth Access Token for both, but Account level endpoints require an additional X-Cyclr-Account HTTP header to identify which Cyclr Account to execute the call against.

Contact Support:
 Name: Cyclr
